craigslist.full_address: 5001 AIRWAYS BLVD. near HOLMES RD, Memphis Promotion Awaits
craigslist.geocode_query: 5001 AIRWAYS BLVD. near HOLMES RD, Memphis Promotion Awaits
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post At Highland Meadows there is a unit waiting just for you!! We offer spacious 1 and 2 BR units with walk-in closets and washer/ dryer connections. Our pet friendly gated community also offers a pool, playground, pond and fitness center. Located off Airways Blvd, we are minutes away from restaurants, shopping and entertainment. Our 1-bedroom units rent for $775 per month with 750 square feet and our 2-bedroom units rent for $875 per month with 950 square feet. We have units available as soon as July 10th. Requirements- Photo ID - $50 application fee - $250 NON-REFUNDABLE administrative fee (paid only after you have received an approval) - 6 months continuous employment (NO GAPS) - No violent misdemeanors, vandalism charges, bankruptcies, felonies or evictions - Can not have a balance with MLGW - Must make 3 times the rent amount - Most recent check stubs (4 if paid weekly, 2 if paid biweekly) Please have your check stubs from employment apps printed out for speedy processing. Screenshots are NOT accepted. - Employment must be verifiable - 3–5-day application processing MOVE IN SPEACIAL!!!! ***SPIN THE WHEEL*** Move in the this month and get your chance to SPIN THE WHEEL for amazing prizes, including: -Half Off First Month's Rent -Flat-Screen TV (LIMITED) -Ring Security Camera -3 Months FREE Rent -$100 OFF First Four Months' Rent -$50 Visa Gift Card EVERYONE WINS SOMETHING! CATCH THIS DEAL WHILE IT LASTS!!!
